human_actions_pending.action: Open monopo.vn and Wope in Chrome for reverse-engineering session
human_actions_pending.context: Andrew will guide which design elements to extract. Chrome DevTools MCP required for inspection.

decisions.decision: Clean slate homepage — wiped 8 existing sections
decisions.rationale: Avoid muddiness, start fresh, old data preserved in git history

decisions.decision: Design process is reverse-engineering from reference sites
decisions.rationale: Andrew works visually — needs to see and react to live sites, not answer abstract questions
Andrew and Alison both liked the fluid, organic, dark aesthetic
Purple palette, bento grid, card styles — liked but Monopo is the main target
Andrew explicitly rejected being asked hex values/font names without visual context. Inspect live sites together.
Andrew described this as 'a lengthy process' — expect multiple rounds

next_action: Open monopo.vn in Chrome, use Chrome DevTools MCP to inspect and reverse-engineer design values (colors, fonts, spacing, animations) with Andrew guiding what to extract. Then apply to Shopify theme.
context_notes: Phase 1 (Foundation Skeleton) is COMPLETE — all 4 requirements verified, 10/10 must-haves passed. Phase 2 (Design System) context captured but NO plans created yet. The design system will be built iteratively by reverse-engineering reference websites. Andrew is a designer/developer who controls visual direction. His mum Alison owns the crystal shop (Totally Spellbound, Sutton-in-Ashfield). The project has full research (local competitors, UK landscape, design direction) and a 7-phase roadmap through to SLC. Shopify CLI needs to be installed for dev server (brew install shopify-cli). The store is totally-spellbound-2.myshopify.com.
